prompt: a laptop is on the right side of a knife

checks.name: object_presence
checks.evidence: The rendered observer view shows one laptop and one knife on the tabletop.

checks.name: spatial_relation
checks.evidence: In the observer-camera preview, the laptop appears on the right side of the knife.

checks.name: table_contact_and_penetration
checks.evidence: No obvious floating, severe table penetration, or sideways laptop pose is visible from the observer camera.

checks.name: prompt_match
checks.evidence: The scene visually satisfies: a laptop is on the right side of a knife.

limitations: This is a Codex visual reference review from the current development session, not a reproducible external VLM API call.
Future automated runs should use an external VLM backend or a required human review report before marking pipeline_summary.status as pass.
